message:
fix(combinator): replace hedge! no-op macro with compile_error, fix pipeline must_use warnings

hedge! macro was a publicly-exported no-op that silently dropped all arguments.
Changed to compile_error! consistent with the pipeline! fix. Also suppressed
must_use warnings in pipeline.rs #[should_panic] tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
